query:
INSERT INTO historical_event (
            application_number,
            drug_name,
            sponsor_name,
            application_type,
            approval_date,
            review_priority,
            decision_outcome,
            enrichment_status,
            source
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
        RETURNING id
